nasb.text: but I have prayed for you, that your faith may not fail; and you, when once you have turned again, strengthen your brothers.”

esv.text: but I have prayed for you that your faith may not fail. And when you have turned again, strengthen your brothers.”

cnv.text: 但我已經為你祈求，叫你的信心不至失掉。你回頭的時候，要堅固你的弟兄。”

ccb.text: 但我已经为你祷告了，叫你不至于失去信心。你回头以后，要让你的弟兄刚强。”

csbs.text: 但是，我已经为你祈求，使你不失去信仰。所以当你回转过来的时候，要坚固你的弟兄们。”
